name: SAME - Stateless Agent Memory Engine
description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents. Local-first SQLite + vector search. 17 MCP tools for semantic search, note management, decision tracking, session handoffs, and memory integrity. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP client.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Semantic search across your knowledge base using vector embeddings and keyword matching

tools.name: search_notes_filtered
tools.description: Search with domain, workstream, and tag filters for precise knowledge retrieval

tools.name: search_across_vaults
tools.description: Federated search across multiple registered vaults for cross-project knowledge

tools.name: get_note
tools.description: Read full note content by path from the indexed vault

tools.name: find_similar_notes
tools.description: Discover related notes by semantic similarity for knowledge graph exploration

tools.name: get_session_context
tools.description: Get pinned notes, latest handoff, and recent decisions for session orientation

tools.name: recent_activity
tools.description: List recently modified notes to stay aware of vault changes

tools.name: save_note
tools.description: Create or update a markdown note with automatic indexing and provenance tracking

tools.name: save_decision
tools.description: Log a structured project decision with title, body, and status tracking

tools.name: create_handoff
tools.description: Write a session handoff note for seamless multi-session continuity

tools.name: save_kaizen
tools.description: Log improvement items (friction, bugs, ideas) with provenance tracking

tools.name: reindex
tools.description: Re-scan and re-index the vault after external changes

tools.name: index_stats
tools.description: Get index health metrics: note count, chunk count, last indexed, database size

tools.name: mem_consolidate
tools.description: Consolidate related notes into knowledge summaries via LLM

tools.name: mem_brief
tools.description: Generate an AI-powered orientation briefing from vault contents

tools.name: mem_health
tools.description: Vault health score with trust state and provenance analysis

tools.name: mem_forget
tools.description: Suppress a note from search results without deleting it
